pages.title: Alter Ego
pages.purpose: The interactive product: take the questionnaire and get your result.

props.intro: FREE, forever. Paste nothing — just answer 5 quick, revealing questions. In

pages.title: About
pages.purpose: Plain statement of what this venture is.

props.text:
People do not share utilities — they share identity. Spotify Wrapped, MBTI, and
every viral "which one are you" test work because they hand someone a mirror and
a label they are proud to post. Alter Ego is that mechanic built as an AI product:
answer a handful of honest questions and get back a named "alter ego" — an
evocative archetype, a sharp-but-warm reading of who you are, your strengths and
your shadow, and a one-line metaphor — rendered as a beautiful, screenshot-ready
card. It costs ~nothing to run (local model + templated card), spreads itself
("what's your Alter Ego?"), and every share is an ad we never paid for. For the
AI OS this is an audience engine and a factory proof: it builds the reusable
"questionnaire -> AI identity -> shareable card -> captured email" machine that
the business-vitals vertical then reuses.

acceptance: the questionnaire renders and can be submitted
submitting returns a complete result with no empty fields
the result is a templated CSS/HTML card, not a per-user generated image
email capture records the contact before the full result is shown
the app degrades cleanly on mobile and with reduced motion
